contribution_description: [CONTRIBUTION EVENT] - Type: Time (Minutes) - Amount: 30 - Description: Rectify untracked Gmail drafts: delete + regenerate 6 with tracking pixel Pull requests (GitHub evidence): - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/75 Details: ## What changed Operational rectification: regenerated six pending Gmail drafts (1 warm-up + 5 follow-ups) that had been previously created by the AI email-agent pipeline without `--track-opens` / `--track-clicks` flags, so they shipped as plain-text-only with no open pixel and no HTML alternative. Without the rectification, any of those drafts that the operator sent would have been measurement-blind for opens / clicks (no way to retro-fit a tracking pixel into mail that already exists in the recipient's inbox). Workflow: - Identified the six pending plain-text drafts on the `Email Agent Drafts` tab (rows 113–118): `info@brazilkiss.com`, `maypopherbshop@gmail.com`, `earthtoneswb@gmail.com`, `fremontnatural@gmail.com`, `meditate@ichakras.com` (5 follow-ups), and `sunny@countrysun.com` (1 warm-up). All six confirmed as `text/plain`-only, zero pixel, zero HTML alt. - Ran `sync_email_agent_followup.py` first to record yesterday's Berkeley Herbal Center redirect on the `Email Agent Follow Up` tab so the cadence guard would skip that address — otherwise the warm-up pipeline would have re-drafted it. - Deleted the six plain-text Gmail drafts via the Gmail API. Both pipelines' built-in reconciler then auto-marked the matching `Email Agent Drafts` rows as `discarded`, allowing immediate re-drafting via the cadence-bypass-after-discarded-draft branch. - `--dry-run` on both pipelines first to confirm scope was exactly the six addresses (no surprise extras): warm-up dry-run reported `count=1 skipped_cadence=58`, follow-up dry-run reported `count=5 skipped_cadence_too_soon=13`. - Live-ran both pipelines with `--use-grok` (model `grok-3`, matching the originals). The new tracking defaults from PR #75 kicked in automatically. Verified all six new drafts ship with the visible Agroverse-logo block + `` keyed to a fresh UUID matching the new `Email Agent Drafts` row. - Verified the warm-up to `sunny@countrysun.com` also picked up the three default attachments from PR #74 (wholesale PDF + packaging front + packaging back). Drafts left in the inbox for human review; nothing was sent. ## Why The original drafts were untracked because tracking was opt-in via flags. The flag-default flip (PR #75) prevents future occurrences, but doesn't fix already-pending plain-text drafts — those had to be deleted and regenerated explicitly. Doing so unblocks the PR #74 cohort study scheduled for 2026-05-11 (warm-up packaging-photos comparison): without the regenerated, tracked warm-up to `sunny@countrysun.com`, the post-cutoff cohort would have had a measurement gap. ## Pull requests - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/75 (merged) — flag default flip; the operational regeneration work executed against this code. - Contributor(s): Garyjob - TDG Issued: 50.00 - Attached Filename: N/A - Destination Contribution File Location: N/A -------- My Digital Signature:  Request Transaction ID:  This submission was generated using https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/blob/main/DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
